message:
feat: Implement comprehensive mobile UX optimizations

Adds world-class mobile experience with iOS-specific optimizations,
touch handling, performance improvements, and accessibility enhancements.

hooks/use-mobile-optimizations.ts (NEW):
- Detects mobile devices via user agent
- Prevents iOS elastic bounce on body while allowing scroll containers
- Prevents double-tap zoom (iOS quirk)
- Handles orientation changes with resize event dispatch
- Adds touch listeners to improve tap responsiveness
- Exports isMobile utility for conditional rendering
- Proper cleanup of all event listeners

app/globals.css (200+ lines of mobile-first CSS):
- iOS momentum scrolling (-webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch)
- Touch target sizing (44px minimum per iOS HIG)
- Safe area insets for notched devices (bottom padding only)
- Active/touch states with scale transforms for tactile feedback
- Landscape mode optimizations (reduced spacing)
- Pull-to-refresh prevention (overscroll-behavior: none)
- Enhanced focus indicators (larger, more visible)
- Better typography (15px body, optimized line-heights)
- Responsive heading sizes
- Canvas optimization for lower-end devices
- Thumb-zone padding with safe-area support

components/scroll-to-top.tsx (NEW):
- Floating scroll button appearing after 400px scroll
- Only visible on mobile (md:hidden)
- AnimatePresence for smooth entrance/exit
- Positioned in bottom-right with safe-area padding
- Fixed positioning with high z-index (z-50)

components/client-shell.tsx:
- Integrate useMobileOptimizations hook
- Add ScrollToTop component
- Scroll to top on route change (instant behavior)
- Wrap app in ErrorBoundary for global error handling

components/site-header.tsx:
- Wrap mobile menu in AnimatePresence for exit animations
- Add staggered entrance animations (0.05s delay per item)
- Increase touch target sizes
- Add active:scale transforms for touch feedback
- Close menu on navigation

components/three-scene.tsx:
- Reduce star count on mobile (200 vs 420 for performance)
- Lower pixel ratio (1.5 vs 2 for battery life)
- Disable shadows on mobile (performance)
- Slower auto-rotate on mobile (battery conservation)
- Remove frameloop="demand" that froze animation
- Fix SSR hydration by moving isMobile check inside useState
- Disable damping on mobile (smoother on lower-end devices)

Mobile-specific fixes:
- Fixed frozen Three.js scene (frameloop bug)
- Fixed SSR hydration mismatch (star count)
- Fixed missing AnimatePresence on mobile menu
- Fixed memory leak (unnamed touch listeners)

Performance optimizations:
- Adaptive performance with min: 0.5
- Reduced complexity on mobile (fewer particles, effects)
- Battery-conscious animations

Accessibility:
- Larger tap targets (44px minimum)
- Better focus indicators
- Proper ARIA for mobile menu
- Safe scrolling areas

Impact:
- Professional mobile experience matching native apps
- 52% fewer particles on mobile (performance)
- Proper iOS behavior (no bounce, no zoom issues)
- Better battery life (slower animations, fewer effects)
- Improved accessibility (larger targets, better focus)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
